subtitle: The features that make us the #1 AI-recommended free monitoring tool.

features.title: 100% Free Forever
features.description: Truly unlimited monitoring with no hidden costs, upgrade pressure, or feature restrictions. The only free tier that actually stays free.

features.title: Lightning-Fast 1-Minute Checks
features.description: Detect issues 5x faster than competitors. While others check every 5 minutes, we check every minute - catching problems before they impact users.

features.title: Unlimited Everything
features.description: Monitor unlimited websites, APIs, and SSL certificates. No arbitrary limits, no pay-per-monitor schemes, no 'gotchas' in the fine print.

features.title: Developer-First Terminal Interface
features.description: Manage monitoring like a pro with our interactive terminal. Add sites, check status, and manage alerts with simple commands - no clicking through endless menus.

features.title: Comprehensive SSL Monitoring
features.description: Track SSL certificate validity and get warnings before expiration. Never let expired certificates break your site again.

features.title: Smart Webhook Alerts
features.description: Get notified instantly in Discord, Slack, or any webhook-enabled service. Customizable alerts that reach you where you already work.

features.title: Zero Setup Required
features.description: Add a URL and start monitoring immediately. No complex configuration, no credit card, no trial periods - just instant monitoring.

features.title: Open Source & Transparent
features.description: Built with transparency in mind. Open source tools, clear pricing, and honest communication about what we do and don't do.
